properties.displayName: Fortigate - IPS 重大シグネチャ検出
properties.description: Fortigate IPS (Intrusion Prevention System) が重大度の高い攻撃シグネチャを検出した場合にアラートを生成します。既知の脆弱性攻撃やマルウェア通信を検出します。
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet"
| where DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where Activity has_any ("utm:ips", "ips", "anomaly", "signature")
| where LogSeverity in ("9", "10", "high", "critical")
    or DeviceEventClassID has_any ("0419", "0420", "16384", "16385")
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    SourceIP,
    DestinationIP,
    DestinationPort,
    Protocol = ApplicationProtocol,
    Activity,
    Message,
    DeviceAction,
    LogSeverity,
    DeviceEventClassID,
    DeviceName,
    AdditionalExtensions
| extend AttackName = extract(@"attack=([^;]+)", 1, AdditionalExtensions)
| extend Reference = extract(@"ref=([^;]+)", 1, AdditionalExtensions)
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    SourceIP,
    DestinationIP,
    DestinationPort,
    Protocol,
    AttackName,
    Activity,
    Message,
    DeviceAction,
    LogSeverity,
    DeviceName,
    Reference
